item.title: day1
item.description:
###插值和拟合 ‘’‘ python import numpy as np x = np.arange(0,20) y = x**2 + 4*x + np.random.randint(-5,15,20)
target = np.polyfit(x,y,2) print(np.poly1d(target)) y1 = target[0]*x**2+target[1]*x+target[2]
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt plt.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 1) plt.plot(x,y1,c = 'r') plt.show() ’‘’ 以下为插值拟合的完整代码 包括了polyfit和curve_fit ‘’‘ python
import numpy as np from scipy.optimize import curve_fit x = np.arange(0,20) y = x**2 + 4*x + np.random.randint(-5,15,20)
target = np.polyfit(x,y,2) print(np.poly1d(target)) y1 = target[0]*x**2+target[1]*x+target[2]
def fun(x,a,b,c): return a*x**2 + b*x +c
popt,_ = curve_fit(fun,x,y,[1,1,1]) print(popt) y2 = fun(x,*popt)
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig,(ax1,ax2,ax3) = plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(10,8)) ax1.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 1) ax2.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 0.5) ax2.plot(x,y1,c = 'r') ax3.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 0.5) ax3.plot(x,y2,c = 'green') plt.show() import numpy as np from scipy.optimize import curve_fit x = np.arange(0,20) y = x**2 + 4*x + np.random.randint(-5,15,20)
target = np.polyfit(x,y,2) print(np.poly1d(target)) y1 = target[0]*x**2+target[1]*x+target[2]
def fun(x,a,b,c): return a*x**2 + b*x +c
popt,_ = curve_fit(fun,x,y,[1,1,1]) print(popt) y2 = fun(x,*popt)
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig,(ax1,ax2,ax3) = plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(10,8)) ax1.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 1) ax2.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 0.5) ax2.plot(x,y1,c = 'r') ax3.scatter(x,y,marker = 'x',lw = 0.5) ax3.plot(x,y2,c = 'green') plt.show() ’‘’ ##结果如下 ！（效果截图）（https://github.com/yu218yu/yuyu.github.io/blob/main/4a4283db-636e-4ba8-869c-df429ea66fc4.png?raw=true）。
